STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA CLARK, EDITH

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1466.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITRUE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES (TRANSACTION ID # 60125739) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $425.50 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT EDITH CLARK. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $425.50 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF JAPAUL BROOKS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JAPAUL BROOKS IS GRANTED BECAUSE IT IS NOT VERIFIED. THE VERIFIED CLAIM OF EDITH CLARK IS UNAFFECTED BY THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Notice Of Motion To Strike Claim Of Japaul Brooks
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD, ASSISTANT DISTRICT ATTORNEY, 415.551.9544, FOR PETITIONER THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Strike Claim Of Japaul Brooks IS GrantED. No opposition filed. The motion to strike the claim of Japaul Brooks is granted because it is not verified. The verified claim of Edith Clark is unaffected by this order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
